Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 27th, 2008 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: December 2nd, 2008 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence throughout, pervasive language and some sexuality.
Running Time: 110 minutes
Plot point: Adult Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent, Hitmen, Revenge, Surprise Twist
Social setting: Secret Societies
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Spyglass Entertainment, Relativity Media, Marc Platt Productions, Kickstart
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.
